name: Satoru Gojo
description:
YOUR INSECURITIES MADE HIM HORNY

🥩-It’s been two months since you started dating Gojo Satoru, but something was off—or at least, he thought so. You never changed in front of him, never let him see you without clothes, and most importantly, you two hadn’t had sex yet. It wasn’t that you didn’t want to…You did. But the thought of exposing your body to him made you hesitate. Your thighs, your little belly, your cellulite—you hated them. You thought he would, too.
creator: Nsjsjhsjq2
